'''natunu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:smalltimer|smalltimer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-t-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:smalltimer|smalltimer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| natunu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nætinith|nætinith]] || [[word:nætinij|nætinij]] || [[word:nætinish|nætinish]] || [[word:nætini|nætini]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:natutunuth|natutunuth]] || [[word:natutunuj|natutunuj]] || [[word:natutunush|natutunush]] || [[word:natutunu|natutunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:natunuth|natunuth]] || [[word:natunuj|natunuj]] || [[word:natunush|natunush]] || [[word:natunu|natunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:natufnuth|natufnuth]] || [[word:natufnuj|natufnuj]] || [[word:natufnush|natufnush]] || [[word:natufnuf|natufnuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:natunuthu|natunuthu]] || [[word:natunuju|natunuju]] || [[word:natunushu|natunushu]] || [[word:natunuku|natunuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:natunuth|natunuth]] || [[word:natunuj|natunuj]] || [[word:natunush|natunush]] || [[word:natunu|natunu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:natunuthul|natunuthul]] || [[word:natunujul|natunujul]] || [[word:natunushul|natunushul]] || [[word:natunukul|natunukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:natunuthuthu|natunuthuthu]] || [[word:natunujuju|natunujuju]] || [[word:natunushushu|natunushushu]] || [[word:natunuku|natunuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:natunuthun|natunuthun]] || [[word:natunujun|natunujun]] || [[word:natunushun|natunushun]] || [[word:natunukun|natunukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:natunuthuoro|natunuthuoro]] || [[word:natunujuoro|natunujuoro]] || [[word:natunushuoro|natunushuoro]] || [[word:natunukuoro|natunukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
